Class Reader

java.lang.Object
com.library.model.Reader
public class Reader extends Object
Represents a library reader (patron) in the Library Management System.

Maps to the readers table in the database: 

  id (PK) | full_name | email (UNIQUE) | phone | reg_date

A reader may have zero or more associated Loan records. Deletion of a reader is restricted by the database if any loans reference it.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private String
    email
    Email address; nullable but UNIQUE when present.
    private String
    fullName
    Full display name of the reader (NOT NULL in DB).
    private int
    id
    Primary key.
    private String
    phone
    Phone number in any format; nullable.
    private LocalDate
    regDate
    Registration date.

    Description

  • Field Details

    • id

      private int id
      Primary key. Set by the database on INSERT.

    • fullName

      private String fullName
      Full display name of the reader (NOT NULL in DB).

    • email

      private String email
      Email address; nullable but UNIQUE when present.

    • phone

      private String phone
      Phone number in any format; nullable.

    • regDate

      private LocalDate regDate
      Registration date. Defaults to the current date in the database (DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE); never null in practice.

  • Constructor Details

    • Reader

      public Reader()
      No-arg constructor required for DAO result mapping.

    • Reader

      public Reader(int id, String fullName, String email, String phone, LocalDate regDate)
      Full constructor used by ReaderDaoImpl when mapping a ResultSet.
      Parameters:
      id - primary key
      fullName - full display name
      email - email address (may be null)
      phone - phone number (may be null)
      regDate - registration date

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns:
      primary key of this reader

    • getFullName

      public String getFullName()
      Returns:
      full display name

    • getEmail

      public String getEmail()
      Returns:
      email address, or null

    • getPhone

      public String getPhone()
      Returns:
      phone number, or null

    • getRegDate

      public LocalDate getRegDate()
      Returns:
      registration date (never null in practice)

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - primary key (assigned after INSERT)

    • setFullName

      public void setFullName(String n)
      Parameters:
      n - full display name (must not be blank)

    • setEmail

      public void setEmail(String email)
      Parameters:
      email - email address; null is allowed

    • setPhone

      public void setPhone(String phone)
      Parameters:
      phone - phone number; null is allowed

    • setRegDate

      public void setRegDate(LocalDate d)
      Parameters:
      d - registration date
